Appearances:
Plaintiff Hotel Essex is present. Represented by: Lashaun Jones.
Attorney Julia Adams for the plaintiff.
Defendant Anthony Hollie is present.
Attorney Christopher Magana appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of April 18, 2016 is vacated. (501)
